# Rates Engine ‚Äî Configuration Reference

This file is **generated** from the struct tags in
`internal/config/config.go` and regenerated by the
`docs-config` subcommand of `ratesengine-ops`.

To add / rename / remove a config option:

1. Edit `internal/config/config.go` (struct field + tags).
2. `make docs-config` (regenerates this file).
3. Commit both in the same PR.

Operators hand-edit a TOML file that maps onto this schema.
Secrets never live in the TOML file itself ‚Äî reference them via
the `env:` column.

## Top-level sections


### `[region]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `region.id` | `string` | `r1` | ‚Äî | Short region identifier, lowercase (r1/r2/r3). |
| `region.name` | `string` | `London` | ‚Äî | Human-readable region name (London, Ashburn, ‚Ä¶). |
| `region.home_domain` | `string` | `ratesengine.net` | ‚Äî | DNS home domain for this org (used in stellar.toml + SCP quorum sub-quorum). |

### `[stellar]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `stellar.network` | `string` | `pubnet` | ‚Äî | Network passphrase name ‚Äî pubnet / testnet / futurenet. |
| `stellar.core_http_endpoint` | `string` | `http://127.0.0.1:11626` | ‚Äî | stellar-core admin HTTP (used for liveness). |
| `stellar.rpc_endpoints` | `[]string` | `["http://127.0.0.1:8000"]` | ‚Äî | stellar-rpc endpoints for getEvents/getLedgers. Tried in order on failover. |
| `stellar.history_archive_url` | `string` | `https://history.stellar.org/prd/core-live/core_live_001` | ‚Äî | Public history archive (SDF or ours) for backfill catchup. |

### `[storage]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `storage.postgres_dsn` | `string` | `postgres://ratesengine@127.0.0.1:5432/ratesengine?sslmode=disable` | `RATESENGINE_POSTGRES_DSN` | Postgres DSN; password resolved via env: prefix. |
| `storage.redis_addr` | `string` | `127.0.0.1:6379` | ‚Äî | Redis master address host:port. |
| `storage.redis_password_env` | `string` | _(required)_ | `RATESENGINE_REDIS_PASSWORD` | Env var holding the Redis password (reference, not the password itself). |
| `storage.s3_endpoint` | `string` | `http://127.0.0.1:9000` | ‚Äî | S3-compatible object-store endpoint (MinIO / AWS S3). |
| `storage.s3_region` | `string` | `r1` | ‚Äî | S3 region label (free-form for MinIO; AWS region name otherwise). |
| `storage.s3_bucket_archive` | `string` | `galexie-archive` | ‚Äî | Immutable history-archive bucket name. |
| `storage.s3_bucket_live` | `string` | `galexie-live` | ‚Äî | Live Galexie export bucket name. |
| `storage.s3_access_key_env` | `string` | `RATESENGINE_S3_ACCESS_KEY` | `RATESENGINE_S3_ACCESS_KEY` | Env var holding S3 access key ID. |
| `storage.s3_secret_key_env` | `string` | `RATESENGINE_S3_SECRET_KEY` | `RATESENGINE_S3_SECRET_KEY` | Env var holding S3 secret access key. |

### `[ingestion]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `ingestion.enabled_sources` | `[]string` | `["soroswap","aquarius","phoenix"]` | ‚Äî | List of source connector names to run on this indexer replica. See config.KnownSources for valid values. |
| `ingestion.backfill_from_ledger` | `uint32` | `0` | ‚Äî | Earliest ledger to backfill from; 0 = continue-from-persisted-cursor. |
| `ingestion.backfill_batch_size` | `uint32` | `64` | ‚Äî | Ledgers per backfill fetch batch. |
| `ingestion.cursor_store_scheme` | `string` | `postgres` | ‚Äî | Where per-source cursors live ‚Äî postgres / redis. |

### `[oracle]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `oracle.reflector.dex_contract` | `string` | _(required)_ | ‚Äî | Reflector DEX contract (C-prefix) on mainnet. |
| `oracle.reflector.cex_contract` | `string` | _(required)_ | ‚Äî | Reflector CEX contract (C-prefix) on mainnet. |
| `oracle.reflector.fx_contract` | `string` | _(required)_ | ‚Äî | Reflector FX contract (C-prefix) on mainnet. |
| `oracle.redstone.adapter_contract` | `string` | _(required)_ | ‚Äî | RedStone Adapter contract (C-prefix) on mainnet ‚Äî CA526Y2NQWGWVVQ7RFFPGAZMU66PSYJ3UC2MTVAV4ZU7OM5BOPHDXUSG. |
| `oracle.band.standard_reference_contract` | `string` | _(required)_ | ‚Äî | Band Protocol StandardReference contract (C-prefix) on mainnet ‚Äî CCQXWMZVM3KRTXTUPTN53YHL272QGKF32L7XEDNZ2S6OSUFK3NFBGG5M. |
| `oracle.soroswap.factory_contract` | `string` | _(required)_ | ‚Äî | Soroswap factory contract (C-prefix) on mainnet ‚Äî CA4HEQTL2WPEUYKYKCDOHCDNIV4QHNJ7EL4J4NQ6VADP7SYHVRYZ7AW2. |
| `oracle.soroswap.seed_rpc_endpoint` | `string` | _(required)_ | ‚Äî | stellar-rpc URL used for the boot-time factory sweep. Any public pubnet endpoint works (e.g. https://mainnet.sorobanrpc.com). Falls back to stellar.rpc_endpoints[0] when empty. |

### `[external]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `external.binance.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | ‚Äî | Whether this connector runs. Off by default ‚Äî no network egress until operator opts in. |
| `external.kraken.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | ‚Äî | Whether this connector runs. Off by default ‚Äî no network egress until operator opts in. |
| `external.bitstamp.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | ‚Äî | Whether this connector runs. Off by default ‚Äî no network egress until operator opts in. |
| `external.coinbase.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | ‚Äî | Whether this connector runs. Off by default ‚Äî no network egress until operator opts in. |
| `external.exchangeratesapi.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | ‚Äî | Whether this connector runs. Off by default. |
| `external.exchangeratesapi.api_key` | `string` | _(required)_ | `EXCHANGERATESAPI_KEY` | ExchangeRatesApi access key. Prefer env var; TOML fallback exists for local-dev convenience. |
| `external.exchangeratesapi.base` | `string` | `USD` | ‚Äî | Base currency (USD, EUR, GBP, ‚Ä¶). Defaults to USD. Free tier locked to EUR; paid tier accepts any allow-listed fiat. |
| `external.polygon_forex.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | ‚Äî | Whether this connector runs. Off by default. |
| `external.polygon_forex.api_key` | `string` | _(required)_ | `POLYGON_API_KEY` | Polygon.io API key. Prefer env var POLYGON_API_KEY; TOML fallback for local-dev only. |
| `external.polygon_forex.base` | `string` | `USD` | ‚Äî | Base currency filter. Only tickers matching C:<base><quote> emit. Defaults to USD. |
| `external.coingecko.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | ‚Äî | Whether this connector runs. Off by default ‚Äî no network egress until operator opts in. |
| `external.coinmarketcap.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | ‚Äî | Whether this connector runs. Off by default. |
| `external.coinmarketcap.api_key` | `string` | _(required)_ | `COINMARKETCAP_API_KEY` | CMC Pro API key, passed as X-CMC_PRO_API_KEY header. Prefer env var. |
| `external.cryptocompare.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | ‚Äî | Whether this connector runs. Off by default. |
| `external.cryptocompare.api_key` | `string` | _(required)_ | `CRYPTOCOMPARE_API_KEY` | CryptoCompare API key, passed as 'Authorization: Apikey <KEY>'. Prefer env var. |
| `external.ecb.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | ‚Äî | Whether this connector runs. Off by default ‚Äî no network egress until operator opts in. |

### `[aggregate]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `aggregate.vwap_window_seconds` | `int` | `300` | ‚Äî | Rolling VWAP window in seconds. |
| `aggregate.twap_window_seconds` | `int` | `300` | ‚Äî | Rolling TWAP window in seconds (fallback when volume below threshold). |
| `aggregate.min_usd_volume` | `float64` | `10000` | ‚Äî | Per-pair minimum USD volume within the window for VWAP eligibility. |
| `aggregate.outlier_sigma_threshold` | `float64` | `4` | ‚Äî | Reject trades priced > N sigma from the rolling median before VWAP. |
| `aggregate.triangulation_enabled` | `bool` | `true` | ‚Äî | Enable cross-pair triangulation through USD/BTC when direct pair below threshold. |

### `[api]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `api.listen_addr` | `string` | `0.0.0.0:3000` | ‚Äî | Bind address for the HTTP server. |
| `api.external_base_url` | `string` | `https://api.ratesengine.net/v1` | ‚Äî | Public-facing base URL (e.g. https://api.ratesengine.net/v1). |
| `api.auth_mode` | `string` | `none` | ‚Äî | Authentication mode ‚Äî none / apikey (planned) / sep10 (planned). Default 'none' because the auth middleware has not shipped yet; a non-'none' value with the current binary is cosmetic, not enforced. |
| `api.anon_rate_limit_per_min` | `int` | `60` | ‚Äî | Per-IP rate limit for anonymous requests. |
| `api.key_rate_limit_per_min` | `int` | `1000` | ‚Äî | Per-API-key rate limit, default tier. |
| `api.cdn_enabled` | `bool` | `true` | ‚Äî | Emit CDN-friendly Cache-Control headers on long-immutable endpoints. |
| `api.allowed_origins` | `[]string` | `["*"]` | ‚Äî | CORS allow-list for browser clients. |

### `[obs]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `obs.metrics_listen` | `string` | `127.0.0.1:9464` | ‚Äî | Bind address for the /metrics Prometheus endpoint. |
| `obs.log_level` | `string` | `info` | ‚Äî | Minimum log level ‚Äî debug / info / warn / error. |

| `obs.trace_exporter` | `string` | `none` | ‚Äî | OpenTelemetry trace exporter ‚Äî none / otlp. |
| `obs.trace_sample` | `float64` | `0.1` | ‚Äî | Trace sampling ratio ‚Äî 0.0 (none) to 1.0 (all). |
